jd_text:
Guy Duncan has been appointed Chief Technology and Product Officer at Thunes. The company operates a Direct Global Network that enables businesses to move money across borders quickly and securely, connecting financial institutions, digital wallets and payment providers worldwide.

Guy brings extensive experience in scaling technology platforms and leading digital transformation. Prior to joining Thunes, he served as Chief Technology Officer at OVO and earlier spent nearly five years as CTO at Tide, where he helped scale the platform to more than one million members. His career also includes leadership roles at BMW Group, where he led digital product development and connected services initiatives across global markets.

Earlier in his career, Guy held CTO roles at PayU, bwin and Valtech, alongside senior leadership roles at GiftCertificates.com and Election Systems & Software. With deep expertise in fintech, digital platforms and large scale technology transformation, Guy now steps into the role to lead product and technology innovation at Thunes.

#ExecutiveMoves #Fintech #TechnologyLeadership #DigitalTransformation #Payments #ProductLeadership #GlobalBusiness #Innovation #cxolanes
